entries.value: Déan imeachtaí stairiúla a chíoradh trí chúiseanna, spreagthaí, iarmhairtí agus féidearthachtaí malartacha.

entries.source: Unpack historical events through causes, triggers, consequences, and alternative possibilities.

entries.source: Learners exploring humanities topics who want practical guidance instead of a generic answer box.
entries.value: Foghlaimeoirí atá ag fiosrú ábhair dhaonnachtaí agus ar mian leo treoir phraiticiúil seachas bosca freagraí cineálach.

entries.source: This mode is tuned for history cause-and-effect with its own prompts, examples, and learning flow.
entries.value: Tá an modh seo curtha in oiriúint do chúis agus toradh sa stair, lena leideanna, samplaí agus sreabhadh foghlama féin.
